query: SELECT mp.id, mp.fileName, COUNT(mi.id) as item_count FROM material_plans mp LEFT JOIN material_items mi ON mp.id = mi.planId GROUP BY mp.id, mp.fileName ORDER BY mp.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2oD5Rpux9cjqHPq.05f21cb26eb8 --database ZuNBVd6CLssbosJUyd9j6x --execute SELECT mp.id, mp.fileName, COUNT(mi.id) as item_count FROM material_plans mp LEFT JOIN material_items mi ON mp.id = mi.planId GROUP BY mp.id, mp.fileName ORDER BY mp.id;
